overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban industrial district with towering megastructures and elevated highways, transitioning from open sunlit streets into a covered pedestrian stairway and walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with elevated highway and mega tower

events.description: camera pans down from the tower to street level and begins following the character

agents.ego_description: character walking along the industrial street beneath overhead power lines, with the yellow mega tower on the left

entered.detail: tall brutalist tower with yellow-cream facade and red structural accents
multiple black utility wires crisscrossing the sky
massive concrete and steel elevated highway structure casting shadows
large orange and gray industrial pipes running along the street
multi-lane city street with lane markings

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a dramatic upward view of a massive yellow tower against a clear blue sky, then pans down to street level. The character walks along an industrial urban street with the tower looming on the left and a massive elevated highway structure on the right. Overhead power lines crisscross above as vehicles pass by on the road.

events.description: yellow mega tower passes out of view behind the camera

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk toward the covered stairway entrance, passing under the elevated highway

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the stairway entrance

entered.detail: industrial building with large red and blue SVR logo signage
large geometric metal structure spanning across the street
concrete entrance structure with illuminated edges leading to upper walkway
large cylindrical storage tanks with piping

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the industrial street as the mega tower recedes behind. The SVR building becomes visible ahead, marked by its distinctive signage. The elevated highway structure now dominates the right side of the frame at close proximity. The character approaches a covered stairway entrance that leads up to a pedestrian walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian stairway and elevated walkway

events.description: character enters the covered stairway from the open street
character begins ascending the concrete stairs
character reaches the top of stairs and enters the covered walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs into the covered pedestrian walkway, transitioning from outdoor to enclosed space

notable_agents.action: ascending the stairs ahead of the player character

entered.detail: enclosed concrete stairwell with overhead cover and side openings
vertical illuminated light strips mounted on the walls
smooth concrete handrails along the stairway edges
elevated pedestrian corridor with roof and industrial views

segments.scene_description: The character enters the covered stairway, leaving the open street behind. Fluorescent lights illuminate the concrete stairs as the character ascends. Upon reaching the top, the scene transitions to a covered elevated walkway with industrial piping visible along the walls, providing a sheltered path above the street level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, sun-drenched industrial street into the sheltered confines of an elevated pedestrian walkway. It begins with a dramatic upward tilt toward a massive yellow tower against a clear blue sky before panning down to follow a character walking between the looming tower and a heavy elevated highway. As the character progresses, the tower recedes and the SVR building comes into view, while the highway structure closes in on the right side of the frame. The scene then shifts as the character leaves the open air to enter a covered stairway, where natural light is replaced by the glow of fluorescent lamps during the ascent. Finally, the camera emerges at the top of the stairs onto a covered walkway, moving past industrial piping along the walls in a sheltered path above the city streets.
